description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. It features a skeletonized folding stock, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable curved box magazine. The upper receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail system and a set of iron sights, while the handguard includes a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The barrel is standard length and capped with a flash hider at the muzzle. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a rugged and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a folding skeleton stock, vertical foregrip, and detachable curved magazine, featuring iron sights and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, muzzle, and front sight alignment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, folding skeleton stock, curved magazine, vertical foregrip, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and overall rifle silhouette.
